contentBlocks.original:
या कुन्देन्दु तुषारहारधवला या शुभ्रवस्त्रावृता
या वीणावरदण्डमण्डितकरा या श्वेतपद्मासना
या ब्रह्माच्युत शङ्करप्रभृतिभिर्देवैस्सदा पूजिता
सा मां पातु सरस्वती भगवती निश्शेषजाड्यापहा
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā kundendu tuṣārahāradhavalā yā śubhravastrāvṛtā
yā vīṇāvaradaṇḍamaṇḍitakarā yā śvetapadmāsanā
yā brahmācyuta śaṅkaraprabhṛtibhirdevaissadā pūjitā
sā māṃ pātu sarasvatī bhagavatī niśśeṣajāḍyāpahā
contentBlocks.translation: May Goddess Sarasvatī, who is adorned with a garland of white flowers, dressed in pure white, and seated on a white lotus, who holds the veena (instrument) and is worshipped by all Gods including Brahma, Vishnu, and Shiva, protect me and remove all ignorance.
contentBlocks.meanings: या (yā) – who; कुन्देन्दु (kundendu) – jasmine and moon (kunda:jasmine | indu:moon); तुषारहारधवला (tuṣārahāradhavalā) – white as snow garland (tuṣāra:snow | hāra:garland | dhavalā:white); या (yā) – who; शुभ्रवस्त्रावृता (śubhravastrāvṛtā) – clothed in pure white (śubhra:pure | vastra:clothes | āvṛtā:clothed); या (yā) – who; वीणावरदण्डमण्डितकरा (vīṇāvaradaṇḍamaṇḍitakarā) – hands adorned with veena (vīṇā:veena | vara:excellent | daṇḍa:staff | maṇḍita:adorned | karā:hands); या (yā) – who; श्वेतपद्मासना (śvetapadmāsanā) – seated on white lotus (śveta:white | padma:lotus | āsanā:seated); या (yā) – who; ब्रह्माच्युत (brahmācyuta) – Brahma and Vishnu (brahma:Brahma | acyuta:Vishnu); शङ्करप्रभृतिभिः (śaṅkaraprabhṛtibhiḥ) – and others like Shankara (śaṅkara:Shankara | prabhṛti:and others); देवैः (devaiḥ) – by the gods; सदा (sadā) – always; पूजिता (pūjitā) – worshipped; सा (sā) – she; मां (māṃ) – me; पातु (pātu) – protect; सरस्वती (sarasvatī) – Sarasvati; भगवती (bhagavatī) – Goddess; निश्शेषजाड्यापहा (niśśeṣajāḍyāpahā) – remover of all ignorance (niḥśeṣa:all | jāḍya:ignorance | apahā:remover);
